content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) DIST- RAYAGADA (ODISHA), PIN-765022 [Establlshed vide Odisha Act-23 of 2018, Included by UGC and Approved AICTE, New Delhi] OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2025/ | 416 Date: - 28/08/2025 NOTICE This is for information of all concerned that, the following results have already been published. 1. B.Sc. (Nursing) 2nd Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) B.Sc. (Nursing) 4t Semester Regular Examination (AR-23) B.Sc. (Nursing) 5% Semester Regular Examination (AR-22) 2 3 4. M.A (English) 24 Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) 5. M.Sc.(Ag.) 2 Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) 6 M.Sc. 2nd Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) The students those who are interested for rechecking of their answer scripts may apply in the prescribed format along with required fee of Rs.400/- (Rupees Four Hundred only) per subject to their concerned Head of the department on or before 01.09.2025. Application received beyond the due date will not be considered. N.B: Students shall download the application form from the University website.
